title: Add Delay and Reverb
description: Learn to use the built-in effects to add space and depth to your sounds.

steps.title: Start with a Pattern
steps.instruction: Make sure you have a pattern playing with some notes. Use a previous workflow if needed.

steps.title: Enter Effects Mode
steps.instruction: Press the FX button. The macro knobs now control effect parameters.
steps.tip: Macros 1-4 control Delay, Macros 5-8 control Reverb.

steps.title: Add Delay to a Track
steps.instruction: In FX mode, the pads show send levels. Tap the Delay row (lower pads) to select it, then use Macro knobs 1-8 to set delay send for each track.

substeps.instruction: Tap a pad in the Delay row to select delay sends
Turn the Macro knob corresponding to your track (1=Synth1, 2=Synth2, etc.) to increase delay send

steps.title: Adjust Delay Settings
steps.instruction: Use Macro knobs 1-4 to shape the delay sound.

substeps.instruction: Macro 1: Delay time (try syncing to tempo)

steps.title: Add Reverb
steps.instruction: Tap the Reverb row (upper pads) to select it, then use Macro knobs 1-8 to set reverb send for each track. The macro knobs become context-sensitive to the selected row.
steps.tip: Toggle between Reverb and Delay rows to adjust both effect sends.

outcomes: Understanding of how to access and adjust effects
Ability to add delay and reverb to individual tracks
